name: Cocoa Ripple Ring
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the shortening, sugar, and eggs until light and fluffy.
2. Stir together the flour, salt, and baking powder in a separate bowl.
3. Add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture alternately with the milk, beating well after each addition.
4. Spoon 1/3 of the batter into a well-greased 6 1/2 cup ring pan or 9x9 inch pan.
5. Mix Nestle Quick and chopped walnuts together and sprinkle 1/2 over the batter in the pan.
6. Add the second 1/3 of the batter to the pan, then add the remaining Nestle Quick and walnuts.
7. Top with the remaining batter.
8. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes.
9. Let stand for 5 minutes before turning out of the pan onto a plate.
10. Sprinkle with powdered sugar and serve warm.
